name: Boyd Hill Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Boyd Hill Recreation Center in Rock Hill, SC! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Clover School District Community YMCA
description: Clover School District Community YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clover, SC. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Confederate Park Tennis/Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Confederate Park Tennis/Pickleball Courts in Rock Hill, SC! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Field Day Park
description: Come play pickleball at Field Day Park in Clover, SC! There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved.

name: Fort Mill Baxter Close YMCA
description: Fort Mill Baxter Close YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Fort Mill, SC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Fort Mill Community Center
description: Fort Mill Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Fort Mill, SC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: Indian Land YMCA
description: Indian Land YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fort Mill, SC. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms, locker rooms, food, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and water.
open_play_schedule: M-W-F is Intermediate to Advanced, Tu-Th is Beginner to Intermediate; Use first-come-first-serve stacking for next open court.
